steps.title: Let's build a Spinner Wheel!
steps.description: A Spinner Wheel picks any entry at random — names, topics, prizes, you name it. Press the button at the centre of the wheel to spin; the result shows live on every participant's screen. We'll build one together in under a minute. Click Next to begin.

steps.title: Create a new presentation
steps.description: Click 'New Presentation' to start a fresh deck.

steps.title: Pick the Spinner Wheel slide type
steps.description: Select 'Spinner Wheel' from the slide type picker. You'll find it in the Quiz section — it turns any list into a live random draw.

steps.title: Add your entries
steps.description: Type your entries in the 'Entries' field — one per line. Or paste a whole list from your clipboard at once. Up to 5,000 entries supported.

steps.title: Save your entries
steps.description: Click 'Save' to add your entries to the wheel. The wheel updates instantly on the canvas — you'll see each name appear as a coloured segment.

steps.title: Autofill with participant names
steps.description: Want to pick a random participant? Check 'Participant name autofill' — the wheel fills itself with every participant's name as they join. No manual typing needed.

steps.title: Adjust spin time
steps.description: Use the 'Spin time' setting to control how long the wheel spins before landing. A longer spin builds more suspense — you can set up to 1,200 seconds.

steps.title: Go live and spin the wheel!
steps.description: That's all it takes to set up a Spinner Wheel. Hit 'Present' to go live — then press the button at the centre of the wheel to spin it. The chosen entry appears on your screen and on every participant's device. The winner is in!
